w20: Accelerator-optimized instance with 16 NVIDIA A100 GPUs and 640GB VRAM, ideal for large-scale AI/ML training and scientific computing.
c150: Google Cloud Platform a2-megagpu-16g: Accelerator-optimized with 16 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 96 vCPUs, 1360GB RAM. Ideal for AI/ML and HPC.
c200: Google Cloud Platform a2-megagpu-16g offers extreme acceleration with 16 NVIDIA A100 GPUs and 640GB VRAM, alongside 96 vCPUs and 1360GB RAM. Engineered for demanding AI/ML training, deep learning, and scientific workloads.
w150: Google Cloud Platform a2-megagpu-16g is an accelerator-optimized instance featuring an x86_64 Intel Xeon architecture with 96 vCPUs across 48 physical cores, operating at 2.2 GHz. While single-core CPU performance is in the bottom 25%, its multi-core CPU performance ranks in the top 25%. It is provisioned with 1360 GB of RAM, demonstrating strong memory bandwidth for small block read-only operations (4205.12 GB/sec), though large block read and write bandwidths are average. The instance is heavily equipped with 16 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, providing a substantial 640 GB of total VRAM, making it suitable for demanding parallel processing. Local storage is not bundled. This configuration is engineered for intensive GPU-accelerated workloads such as large-scale machine learning model training, deep learning inference, and scientific simulations requiring massive parallel computation.
